description.value:
You know that sometimes the right answer to technological problems is to simply break something. Attempt a @Check[crafting|against:fortitude] check against the item's DC or the Fortitude DC of the creature possessing the item if the item is being carried, held, or worn. The target is then temporarily immune to your attempts to Break It for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The item becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Glitching]{Glitching 1} for 1 minute.

Success The item becomes glitching 1 for 2 rounds.

Critical Failure Your attempt backfires. If the target has the glitching condition, reduce the value of its glitching condition by 1.
